ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who placed the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item purchased */,
  "price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Pending, Paid, Failed) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Placed, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order should be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing purposes */,
  "total_discount" TEXT /* Total discount applied to the order */,
  "total_tax" TEXT /* Total tax applied to the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Final amount after discounts and taxes */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the author */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Pending, Paid, Failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was last restocked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders_items" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item at the time of the order */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the item in the order */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax applied to the item in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
